biomeinfo.configuration.appendModName.to: If true, will append the mod name the biome is from to the biome name.
biomeinfo.configuration.color.tooltip: The color to display the biome info in (Format: 0xRRGGBB).
biomeinfo.configuration.displayTime.tool: How long in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second) to display the biome info, if "Fade Out" is true. If "Fade In" is true, the time will be counted from the moment the biome info has finished fading in.
biomeinfo.configuration.enabled.tooltip: true if the biome info should be shown, false otherwise.
biomeinfo.configuration.fadeIn.tooltip: true if the biome info should fade in when a different biome has been entered.
biomeinfo.configuration.fadeOut.tooltip: true if the biome info should fade out shortly after a different biome has been entered. If this is set to false, the biome info will stay visible.
biomeinfo.configuration.fallbackOnUntran: If true, will automatically format biome names that do not have a proper translation into an English name.
biomeinfo.configuration.hideOnDebugScree: If true, hides the mod's info text when the debug screen (F3) is open.
biomeinfo.configuration.hideWithUI.toolt: If true, hides the mod's info text when the game's UI is also hidden (F1).
biomeinfo.configuration.posX.tooltip: The horizontal position to display the biome info at.
biomeinfo.configuration.posY.tooltip: The vertical position to display the biome info at.
biomeinfo.configuration.positionPreset.t: This lets BiomeInfo automatically determine the correct position of the text. If this is set to NONE, then BiomeInfo will use the "Horizontal position", "Vertical position", or "Text alignment" configuration settings. If this is set to anything other than NONE, they will be ignored.
biomeinfo.configuration.scale.tooltip: The size of the biome info (multiplier).
biomeinfo.configuration.textAlignment.to: The text alignment of the biome info.
biomeinfo.configuration.textShadow.toolt: true if the biome info should be rendered with a shadow, false otherwise.
biomeinfo.configuration.title: BiomeInfo Configuration
text.autoconfig.biomeinfo.option.appendM: Append mod name to biome name
text.autoconfig.biomeinfo.option.hideWit: Hide text when UI is hidden (F1)
text.autoconfig.biomeinfo.title: BiomeInfo Settings
